title: Intermediate Software Engineer (Calypso)
description:
Job Duties:

  • Develop and maintain Java-based solutions on the Calypso v14.4 platform.

  • Design, build, and enhance internal components and custom Calypso modules.

  • Provide Level 1 and Level 2 application support, including issue troubleshooting and resolution.

  • Analyse business requirements, enhancement requests, and bug fixes, and translate them into technical solutions.

  • Participate in monthly release cycles, covering analysis, development, testing, and deployment.

  • Support production releases and ensure application stability post-deployment.

  • Collaborate with business users and cross-functional IT teams to deliver high-quality solutions.

  • Document technical designs, enhancements, fixes, and release deliverables.

  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives, including process and system optimisations.

  • Coach and support junior team members when required.

Job Requirements:

  • 3–6 years of hands-on experience in Java application development and support.

  • Strong technical skills in Java, PL/SQL, and Linux environments.

  • Experience with Calypso v13 or above, preferably v14.4.

  • Hands-on experience in Calypso Back-Office modules and customisations.

  • Solid understanding of trade lifecycle and financial products (e.g. repos, bonds, SLB, issuances).

  • Experience with regulatory reporting such as HRF, NORIA, or MMSR.

  • Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.

  • Experience with DevOps and CI/CD tools such as Git, Jenkins, MasterDeploy, SVN.

  • Exposure to microservices, Kafka, Docker, or Kubernetes is an advantage.

  • Strong communication skills, curiosity for new technologies, and willingness to provide L1 support.



To Apply, please kindly email your updated resume to weizhe.teoh@tg-hr.com

Regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

CEI: R25127749

EA License: 14C7275

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
